choice: Yes — a grouping container entity sits between Person and Holding: it owns many Holdings, and each Holding lives in exactly one container. This is the home for account-level tax treatment, RMD applicability, and ownership.
rationale: The human stated 'Account-Holding makes sense,' accepting the structural relationship. Only the naming of the entity remains in dispute, not its existence or cardinality. (human-settled during grooming, within discussion of "Do Holdings group under an Account entity that sits between Person and Holding — i.e. an Account owns many Holdings, and a Holding always lives in exactly one Account?")
